name: No witnesses to my warehouse fall in Murray - can I still claim?
description: Yes, use medical and employer records.[3]

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my warehouse fall in Murray - can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, use medical and employer records.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, medical records, employer logs, and surveillance can suffice in Utah.[3] Self-reported consistent with evidence. Key factors: (1) Corroborate with docs/photos; (2) Incident report timely; (3) Expert testimony for causation; (4) Avoid inconsistencies. File claim, request video footage immediately. Attorney uncovers hidden evidence.
